mapper.select: SELECT airport_trip as airport_code, CASE airport_trip WHEN 'JFK' THEN '肯尼迪国际机场' WHEN 'LGA' THEN '拉瓜迪亚机场' WHEN 'EWR' THEN '纽瓦克自由国际机场' ELSE airport_trip END as airport_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_amount) as total_amount, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_amount, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY airport_trip

SELECT airport_trip as airport_code, pickup_hour as hour, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, CASE WHEN pickup_hour BETWEEN 7 AND 9 OR pickup_hour BETWEEN 17 AND 19 THEN true ELSE false END as peak_hour FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip = #{airportCode} GROUP BY airport_trip, pickup_hour ORDER BY airport_trip, pickup_hour

SELECT CASE WHEN vendor_name = 'Creative Mobile Technologies' THEN '1' WHEN vendor_name = 'VeriFone Inc' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END as vendor_id, vendor_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_amount, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_trip_distance, 0.0 as market_share FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY vendor_name

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, CASE WHEN vendor_name = 'Creative Mobile Technologies' THEN '1' WHEN vendor_name = 'VeriFone Inc' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END as vendor_id FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND vendor_name = (CASE WHEN #{vendorId} = '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' ELSE 'VeriFone Inc' END) GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN '1' WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN '2' WHEN payment_name = 'No Charge' THEN '3' WHEN payment_name = 'Dispute' THEN '4' WHEN payment_name = 'Unknown' THEN '5' ELSE '1' END as payment_type, CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN '信用卡' WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN '现金' WHEN payment_name = 'No Charge' THEN '无消费' WHEN payment_name = 'Dispute' THEN '争议' WHEN payment_name = 'Unknown' THEN '未知' ELSE payment_name END as payment_desc, CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN 'credit_card' WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN 'cash' WHEN payment_name = 'No Charge' THEN 'no_charge' WHEN payment_name = 'Dispute' THEN 'dispute' WHEN payment_name = 'Unknown' THEN 'unknown' ELSE 'credit_card' END as payment_code, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, SUM(total_amount) as total_amount FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY payment_name

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0) as credit_card_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0) as cash_pct FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT distance_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(avg_distance), 2) as avg_distance FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY distance_range ORDER BY CASE distance_range WHEN '0-5英里' THEN 1 WHEN '5-10英里' THEN 2 WHEN '10-20英里' THEN 3 WHEN '20-50英里' THEN 4 WHEN '50-120英里' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT duration_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_duration_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(avg_duration), 2) as avg_duration FROM analysis_duration_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY duration_range ORDER BY CASE duration_range WHEN '0-10分钟' THEN 1 WHEN '10-20分钟' THEN 2 WHEN '20-30分钟' THEN 3 WHEN '30-60分钟' THEN 4 WHEN '60分钟以上' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT vendor_name as dim1_value, vendor_name as dim1_name, payment_name as dim2_value, payment_name as dim2_name, SUM(COALESCE(vt.trip_count, 0)) as trip_count, SUM(COALESCE(vt.total_revenue, 0)) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(vt.trip_count, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(vt.total_revenue, 0)) / SUM(vt.trip_count) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, COALESCE(AVG(vt.avg_distance), 0) as avg_distance, 0.0 as percentage, #{startDate} as stat_date FROM (SELECT DISTINCT vendor_name FROM analysis_vendor) v CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT payment_name FROM analysis_payment_analysis) p LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor vt ON vt.vendor_name = v.vendor_name AND vt.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis pt ON pt.payment_name = p.payment_name AND pt.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY v.vendor_name, p.payment_name ORDER BY v.vendor_name, p.payment_name

SELECT v.vendor_name as dim1_value, v.vendor_name as dim1_name, a.airport_trip as dim2_value, a.airport_trip as dim2_name, SUM(COALESCE(vt.trip_count, 0)) as trip_count, SUM(COALESCE(vt.total_revenue, 0)) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(vt.trip_count, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(vt.total_revenue, 0)) / SUM(vt.trip_count) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, COALESCE(AVG(vt.avg_distance), 0) as avg_distance, 0.0 as percentage, #{startDate} as stat_date FROM (SELECT DISTINCT vendor_name FROM analysis_vendor) v CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT airport_trip FROM analysis_airport) a LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor vt ON vt.vendor_name = v.vendor_name AND vt.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN analysis_airport at ON at.airport_trip = a.airport_trip AND at.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY v.vendor_name, a.airport_trip ORDER BY v.vendor_name, a.airport_trip

SELECT a.airport_trip as dim1_value, a.airport_trip as dim1_name, p.payment_name as dim2_value, p.payment_name as dim2_name, SUM(COALESCE(at.trip_count, 0)) as trip_count, SUM(COALESCE(at.total_amount, 0)) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(at.trip_count, 0)) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(at.total_amount, 0)) / SUM(at.trip_count) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, COALESCE(AVG(at.avg_distance), 0) as avg_distance, 0.0 as percentage, #{startDate} as stat_date FROM (SELECT DISTINCT airport_trip FROM analysis_airport) a CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT payment_name FROM analysis_payment_analysis) p LEFT JOIN analysis_airport at ON at.airport_trip = a.airport_trip AND at.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis pt ON pt.payment_name = p.payment_name AND pt.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY a.airport_trip, p.payment_name ORDER BY a.airport_trip, p.payment_name

SELECT 'trip_count' as metric_name, stat_date, SUM(trip_count) as value FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date UNION ALL SELECT 'total_amount' as metric_name, stat_date, SUM(total_revenue) as value FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date UNION ALL SELECT 'avg_amount' as metric_name, stat_date, AVG(avg_fare) as value FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date
SELECT stat_date, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_amount FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT stat_date, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_amount, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_amount, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance, SUM(passenger_count) as passenger_count, 0.0 as growth_rate, 0.0 as moving_average FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT v.vendor_name as row_value, p.payment_name as col_value, COALESCE(SUM(vt.trip_count), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(vt.total_revenue), 0) as total_amount FROM (SELECT DISTINCT vendor_name FROM analysis_vendor) v CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT payment_name FROM analysis_payment_analysis) p LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor vt ON vt.vendor_name = v.vendor_name AND vt.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis pt ON pt.payment_name = p.payment_name AND pt.stat_date = vt.stat_date GROUP BY v.vendor_name, p.payment_name

SELECT SUM(total_trips) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_fare, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT passenger_range, passenger_count as avg_passenger_count, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_passenger_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_passenger_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY passenger_range ORDER BY CASE passenger_range WHEN '1人' THEN 1 WHEN '2人' THEN 2 WHEN '3人' THEN 3 WHEN '4人' THEN 4 WHEN '5人及以上' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT tip_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_tip_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(avg_tip), 2) as avg_tip, ROUND(AVG(tip_rate), 2) as avg_tip_rate FROM analysis_tip_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY tip_range ORDER BY CASE tip_range WHEN '无小费' THEN 1 WHEN '0-5%' THEN 2 WHEN '5-10%' THEN 3 WHEN '10-15%' THEN 4 WHEN '15-20%' THEN 5 WHEN '20%以上' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END
